tab.label: Security
neverScanned: This host has never been scanned.
neverScannedHint: Run a scan to see hardening findings (kernel, sysctl, SSH, filesystem).
empty.title: No hardening findings
empty.subtitle: All registered checks ran cleanly.
table.title: Title
checks.skippedHint: These checks did not contribute findings — usually because they don't apply to this OS or the agent could not read the source data.
checklist.heading: Checks
checklist.subheading: Click a row to expand its findings; the icon button on the right re-runs that single check.
coverage.heading: Coverage
coverage.intro: These are every check this agent has registered. Click to expand and see what each one inspects, plus where it maps to industry standards.
coverage.scopeBody: This scanner is positioned as a fast, recurring hardening triage focused on actively-exploited CVEs and the highest-signal misconfigurations. It is NOT a CIS / Lynis / OpenSCAP replacement — those tools cover 200+ checks each. For a comprehensive audit run lynis or oscap on the host directly; we surface the subset of findings most worth waking somebody up over.
page.title: Security
page.subtitle: Findings across every host in this project.
errors.agentOffline: Agent is not connected — last persisted scan shown.
errors.neverScannedAgentOffline: Agent offline and no prior scan on record.
